message:
feat: add Date/Time and UUID functions

- Add NOW(), CURRENT_DATE(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() with JS timestamp sync
- Add YEAR(), MONTH(), DAY(), HOUR(), MINUTE(), SECOND() extractors
- Add DATE(), STRFTIME() for date formatting
- Add GEN_RANDOM_UUID(), IS_UUID() functions
- Fix UUID format (RFC4122 variant) and uniqueness
- Set string column type for date/time and UUID functions

Tests: 194 passed (up from 199 before Date/Time work)
